title: Operation
description: Describes a single API operation on a path.

__schema0.title: tags
__schema0.description: A list of tags for API documentation grouping.

__schema2.title: summary
__schema2.description: A short summary of the operation. Keep under ~120 characters.

__schema3.title: description
__schema3.description: A verbose description. CommonMark syntax MAY be used.

__schema4.title: operationId
__schema4.description: Unique identifier for the operation. Used for code generation.

__schema5.title: parameters
__schema5.description: Parameters for this operation, combined with path-level parameters.

__schema7.title: Reference Object
__schema7.description: A reference to another component in the specification.

examples.description: A user is a type of person.
A pet is a type of animal.
A pet is a type of animal.

__schema8.title: Reference
__schema8.description: A reference to another component in the specification.

__schema12.title: summary
__schema12.description: A short summary which by default SHOULD override that of the referenced component.

__schema13.title: description
__schema13.description: A description which by default SHOULD override that of the referenced component.

__schema16.title: name
__schema16.description: The name of the query parameter. Case-sensitive.

__schema18.title: description
__schema18.description: A description of the parameter. CommonMark syntax MAY be used.

__schema23.description: Allows empty values (?param=). Deprecated in favor of schema-level validation.
__schema23.title: allowEmptyValue

__schema26.title: explode
__schema26.description: For arrays/objects. When true, each value gets its own parameter.

__schema27.description: When true, allows reserved characters without percent-encoding.
__schema27.title: allowReserved

__schema30.title: Schema Object
__schema30.description: A Schema Object defines the shape of a JSON value.

__schema31.title: String Object
__schema31.description: A String Object defines the shape of a string value.

__schema32.title: title
__schema32.description: A title for the schema, used for documentation.

__schema33.title: description
__schema33.description: A description of the schema. CommonMark syntax MAY be used.

__schema34.title: default
__schema34.description: The default value for this schema.

__schema35.title: example
__schema35.description: An example value for this schema.

__schema38.title: enum
__schema38.description: An array of valid values for this schema.

__schema40.title: const
__schema40.description: A constant value that this schema must match.

__schema42.title: Discriminator
__schema42.description: When request bodies or response payloads may be one of a number of different schemas, a discriminator object can be used to aid in serialization, deserialization, and validation.

__schema43.title: propertyName
__schema43.description: The name of the property in the payload that will hold the discriminator value.

__schema44.title: mapping
__schema44.description: An object to hold mappings between payload values and schema names or references.

__schema47.title: defaultMapping
__schema47.description: The default mapping to use when no matching discriminator value is found.

__schema50.title: XML
__schema50.description: A metadata object that allows for more fine-tuned XML model definitions.

__schema51.title: name
__schema51.description: Replaces the name of the element/attribute used for the described schema property.

__schema52.title: namespace
__schema52.description: The URI of the namespace definition.

__schema53.title: prefix
__schema53.description: The prefix to be used for the name.

__schema54.description: Declares whether the property definition translates to an attribute instead of an element.
__schema54.title: attribute

__schema56.description: May be used only for an array definition. Signifies whether the array is wrapped or not.
__schema56.title: wrapped

__schema60.title: ExternalDocumentation
__schema60.description: Allows referencing an external resource for extended documentation.

__schema61.title: description
__schema61.description: A short description of the target documentation.

__schema62.title: url
__schema62.description: The URL for the target documentation.

__schema64.title: readOnly
__schema64.description: When true, the property is only returned in responses, not accepted in requests.

__schema65.title: writeOnly
__schema65.description: When true, the property is only accepted in requests, not returned in responses.

__schema66.title: deprecated
__schema66.description: When true, indicates this schema is deprecated and should be avoided.

__schema68.title: format
__schema68.description: Semantic format hint for string values. Common formats: date-time, email, uuid, uri, hostname, ipv4, byte, binary.

__schema69.title: Pattern
__schema69.description: A regular expression pattern the string must match.

__schema76.title: contentMediaType
__schema76.description: Media type of the encoded string content.

__schema79.title: Number Object
__schema79.description: A Number Object defines the shape of a number value.

__schema81.title: format
__schema81.description: Number precision format. Use 'float' for 32-bit single-precision or 'double' (default) for 64-bit double-precision IEEE 754.

__schema82.title: multipleOf
__schema82.description: Require the number to be a multiple of this value.

__schema84.title: minimum
__schema84.description: Inclusive lower bound for the number.

__schema86.title: maximum
__schema86.description: Inclusive upper bound for the number.

__schema88.title: exclusiveMinimum
__schema88.description: Exclusive lower bound (instance must be > this value).

__schema90.title: exclusiveMaximum
__schema90.description: Exclusive upper bound (instance must be < this value).

__schema92.title: Integer Object
__schema92.description: An Integer Object defines the shape of an integer value.

__schema94.title: format
__schema94.description: Integer size format. Use 'int32' for signed 32-bit (-2B to 2B) or 'int64' for signed 64-bit integers.

__schema95.title: multipleOf
__schema95.description: Require the integer to be a multiple of this value.

__schema97.title: minimum
__schema97.description: Inclusive lower bound for the integer.

__schema99.title: maximum
__schema99.description: Inclusive upper bound for the integer.

__schema101.title: exclusiveMinimum
__schema101.description: Exclusive lower bound (instance must be > this value).

__schema103.title: exclusiveMaximum
__schema103.description: Exclusive upper bound (instance must be < this value).

__schema105.title: Boolean Object
__schema105.description: A Boolean Object defines the shape of a boolean value.

__schema107.title: Null Object
__schema107.description: A Null Object defines the shape of a null value.

__schema109.title: Array Object
__schema109.description: An Array Object defines the shape of an array value.

__schema113.title: prefixItems
__schema113.description: Tuple validation: schemas for items by index (array position).

__schema115.title: contains
__schema115.description: Require the array to contain at least one item matching this subschema.

__schema127.title: Object Object
__schema127.description: An Object Object defines the shape of an object value.

__schema151.title: Composition Schema
__schema151.description: A schema using composition keywords (allOf, anyOf, oneOf, not, if/then/else) without a type constraint.

__schema152.title: allOf
__schema152.description: Require the instance to validate against all subschemas.

__schema154.title: anyOf
__schema154.description: Require the instance to validate against at least one subschema.

__schema156.title: oneOf
__schema156.description: Require the instance to validate against exactly one subschema.

__schema158.title: not
__schema158.description: Require the instance to NOT validate against the given subschema.

__schema160.title: if
__schema160.description: Conditional validation: if the instance matches this schema, apply then; otherwise apply else.

__schema164.title: else
__schema164.description: Subschema applied when if does not match.

__schema167.title: examples
__schema167.description: Multiple named examples. Mutually exclusive with 'example'.

__schema174.title: externalValue
__schema174.description: A URL that points to the literal example.

__schema175.title: dataValue
__schema175.description: The data value of the example before serialization. Mutually exclusive with value and externalValue.

__schema176.title: serializedValue
__schema176.description: The serialized representation of the example. Mutually exclusive with value and externalValue.

__schema178.title: content
__schema178.description: For complex parameters. Mutually exclusive with 'schema'.

__schema180.title: MediaType
__schema180.description: Each Media Type Object provides schema and examples for the media type identified by its key.

__schema188.title: Encoding
__schema188.description: A single encoding definition applied to a single schema property.

__schema189.title: contentType
__schema189.description: The Content-Type for encoding a specific property.

__schema192.title: Header
__schema192.description: The Header Object follows the structure of the Parameter Object.

__schema193.title: Header
__schema193.description: The Header Object follows the structure of the Parameter Object.

__schema194.title: description
__schema194.description: A brief description of the parameter.

__schema195.description: Determines whether this parameter is mandatory.
__schema195.title: required

__schema197.description: Specifies that a parameter is deprecated.
__schema197.title: deprecated

__schema199.description: Sets the ability to pass empty-valued parameters.
__schema199.title: allowEmptyValue

__schema201.title: style
__schema201.description: Describes how the parameter value will be serialized.

__schema225.title: itemSchema
__schema225.description: Schema for individual items in streaming responses.

__schema226.title: itemEncoding
__schema226.description: Encoding for individual items in streaming responses.

__schema231.title: name
__schema231.description: The name of the path parameter. Must match a template expression in the path.

__schema233.title: description
__schema233.description: A description of the parameter. CommonMark syntax MAY be used.

__schema234.description: Path parameters must always be required.
__schema234.title: required

__schema238.title: explode
__schema238.description: For arrays/objects. When true, each value gets its own parameter.

__schema241.title: examples
__schema241.description: Multiple named examples. Mutually exclusive with 'example'.

__schema243.title: content
__schema243.description: For complex parameters. Mutually exclusive with 'schema'.

__schema247.title: name
__schema247.description: The name of the header. Case-insensitive.

__schema249.title: description
__schema249.description: A description of the parameter. CommonMark syntax MAY be used.

__schema254.title: style
__schema254.description: Serialization style. Only 'simple' is valid for headers.

__schema255.title: explode
__schema255.description: For arrays/objects. When true, each value gets its own parameter.

__schema258.title: examples
__schema258.description: Multiple named examples. Mutually exclusive with 'example'.

__schema260.title: content
__schema260.description: For complex parameters. Mutually exclusive with 'schema'.

__schema266.title: description
__schema266.description: A description of the parameter. CommonMark syntax MAY be used.

__schema271.title: style
__schema271.description: Serialization style. Only 'form' is valid for cookies.

__schema272.title: explode
__schema272.description: For arrays/objects. When true, each value gets its own parameter.

__schema275.title: examples
__schema275.description: Multiple named examples. Mutually exclusive with 'example'.

__schema277.title: content
__schema277.description: For complex parameters. Mutually exclusive with 'schema'.

__schema292.title: Response
__schema292.description: Describes a single response from an API Operation.

__schema293.title: Response
__schema293.description: Describes a single response from an API Operation.

__schema301.title: Link
__schema301.description: The Link object represents a possible design-time link for a response.

__schema302.title: Link
__schema302.description: The Link object represents a possible design-time link for a response.

__schema303.title: operationId
__schema303.description: The name of an existing, resolvable OAS operation, as defined with a unique operationId.

__schema304.title: operationRef
__schema304.description: A relative or absolute URI reference to an OAS operation.

__schema305.title: parameters
__schema305.description: A map representing parameters to pass to an operation as specified with operationId or identified via operationRef.

__schema308.title: requestBody
__schema308.description: A literal value or {expression} to use as a request body when calling the target operation.

__schema311.title: Server
__schema311.description: An object representing a Server. OpenAPI 3.2 adds 'name' for identification.

__schema312.title: url
__schema312.description: A URL to the target host. Supports server variables in {braces}. May be relative.

__schema313.title: description
__schema313.description: An optional description of the server.

__schema314.title: variables
__schema314.description: A map of server variables for URL template substitution.

__schema316.title: ServerVariable
__schema316.description: A server variable for URL template substitution. Use {variableName} in the server URL.

__schema317.title: enum
__schema317.description: An enumeration of valid string values for this variable.

__schema319.title: default
__schema319.description: The default value for substitution if not supplied.

__schema320.title: description
__schema320.description: An optional description for the server variable.

__schema322.title: name
__schema322.description: A unique name to identify the server.

__schema330.description: Marks this operation as deprecated. Defaults to false.

__schema331.title: security
__schema331.description: Security requirements for this operation. Overrides root-level security.

__schema332.title: SecurityRequirement
__schema332.description: Lists the required security schemes for this operation.
